title: Add catalog edge states and query-state unit coverage
verify: Catalog UI supports loading, empty result, backend error, missing optional attributes, selected category, selected filters, and search text states.
Pure query-state or filter-normalization helpers have unit coverage where introduced.
evidence_required: Screenshots or component evidence for empty/error/loading states when practical.
constraints: Keep edge-state handling local to catalog UI/helpers.
Do not change backend API semantics in this task.
invariants: Do not hardcode product catalog data in the storefront as source of truth.
Search failures must degrade to a safe error state.
purpose: Cover local catalog UI edge states that can otherwise pass happy-path tests while remaining brittle.
success_outcome: Catalog UI remains stable for empty, error, loading, selected-state, and missing-attribute cases.
anti_goals: Do not alter backend catalog query semantics.
Do not implement product detail or cart behavior.
